message:
fix(security): harden PID hint atomic writes and reject parent traversal in persist paths

Listener PID hint file (startup_checks.rs):
- Handle AlreadyExists and PermissionDenied errors during atomic rename
  by falling back to remove-then-rename, preventing stale PID hint files
  from blocking server startup when a previous instance crashed without
  cleanup or when filesystem permissions prevent atomic overwrites
- Re-validate the real file target path before the fallback remove to
  prevent symlink escape attacks where a stale hint is a symlink to a
  sensitive file
- Add test verifying that write_listener_pid_hint correctly replaces an
  existing hint file with fresh PID and timestamp

TUI persist path validation (tui_persist.rs):
- Reject parent directory traversal ("..") components in persist paths
  with an InvalidInput error instead of naively pushing them onto the
  path accumulator, preventing path traversal attacks where a crafted
  persist path like "../config.env" could escape the intended directory
- Add tests for validate_persist_path rejecting "../config.env" and
  save_palette_usage rejecting "../palette_usage.json"

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
